activation_gate: Deferred. Activate only after the current ComfyUI foundation, Wave70 Mask Factory, Waves71-76 base physics/deformation layers, runtime lanes, cost controls, and strict QA gates are stable enough that this expansion will not derail nearer project milestones. Activation requires an explicit source-cited project decision.

external_references.usage: Advanced procedural, Vellum, SDF, pressure, contact, and tissue simulation backend.

external_references.usage: Realtime proof, Control Rig, Chaos, Deformer Graph, ML Deformer, and render-pass automation backend.

external_references.name: ZBrush ZScript
external_references.usage: Offline/source asset creation for universal base sculpt, alphas, pores, wrinkles, displacement, and corrective sculpt references.

purpose: Strengthen the DAZ boundary and the autonomous process for fitting a Blender-owned universal production mesh to a DAZ Genesis 9/8.1 neutral prototype without inheriting DAZ topology or rig quirks.

requirements.acceptance_criteria: daz_neutral_pose_only_gate is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, DAZ boundary validation, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence daz_neutral_pose_only_gate. It must support DAZ provides only the neutral A/T-pose character shape, optional hair/clothing reference, textures, and reference renders, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: DAZ provides only the neutral A/T-pose character shape, optional hair/clothing reference, textures, and reference renders. Required output: DAZ boundary validation.
requirements.title: Enforce DAZ neutral pose only gate

requirements.acceptance_criteria: no_daz_runtime_morphing_gate is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, no DAZ runtime gate evidence, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence no_daz_runtime_morphing_gate. It must support no DAZ hand pose libraries, dForce, runtime morphing, deformation, rigging, or simulation after prototype registration, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: no DAZ hand pose libraries, dForce, runtime morphing, deformation, rigging, or simulation after prototype registration. Required output: no DAZ runtime gate evidence.
requirements.title: Enforce no DAZ runtime morphing gate

requirements.acceptance_criteria: daz_surface_shell_cleanup is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, DAZ shell cleanup report, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence daz_surface_shell_cleanup. It must support remove or isolate eyes, lashes, teeth, tongue, nails, hair, clothes, accessories, geografts, hidden surfaces, and non-body islands for wrap target creation, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: remove or isolate eyes, lashes, teeth, tongue, nails, hair, clothes, accessories, geografts, hidden surfaces, and non-body islands for wrap target creation. Required output: DAZ shell cleanup report.
requirements.title: Clean DAZ surface shell target

requirements.acceptance_criteria: hollow_mesh_non_blocker_policy is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, hollow mesh policy evidence, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence hollow_mesh_non_blocker_policy. It must support treat DAZ surface shell as reference target only and generate production collision volumes/SDFs from fitted production mesh, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: treat DAZ surface shell as reference target only and generate production collision volumes/SDFs from fitted production mesh. Required output: hollow mesh policy evidence.
requirements.title: Define hollow mesh non-blocker policy

requirements.acceptance_criteria: universal_production_base_mesh_loader is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, base mesh load report, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence universal_production_base_mesh_loader. It must support stable topology, UVs, vertex order, rig landmarks, Wave70 mask IDs, Wave71 map IDs, anchors, and soft-body zones, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: stable topology, UVs, vertex order, rig landmarks, Wave70 mask IDs, Wave71 map IDs, anchors, and soft-body zones. Required output: base mesh load report.
requirements.title: Load universal production base mesh

requirements.acceptance_criteria: rigid_alignment_solver is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, rigid alignment report, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence rigid_alignment_solver. It must support match height, scale, pelvis, head, shoulders, hips, hands, feet, and scene axes, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: match height, scale, pelvis, head, shoulders, hips, hands, feet, and scene axes. Required output: rigid alignment report.
requirements.title: Run rigid alignment solver

requirements.acceptance_criteria: landmark_alignment_solver is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, landmark alignment report, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence landmark_alignment_solver. It must support match face, eyes, mouth, jaw, shoulders, elbows, wrists, hands, chest, waist, hips, knees, ankles, feet, fingers, and toes, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: match face, eyes, mouth, jaw, shoulders, elbows, wrists, hands, chest, waist, hips, knees, ankles, feet, fingers, and toes. Required output: landmark alignment report.
requirements.title: Run landmark alignment solver

requirements.acceptance_criteria: lattice_cage_shape_solver is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, lattice fit report, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence lattice_cage_shape_solver. It must support reshape global and regional proportions while protecting identity, hands, feet, mouth, eyes, joints, and anchors, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: reshape global and regional proportions while protecting identity, hands, feet, mouth, eyes, joints, and anchors. Required output: lattice fit report.
requirements.title: Run lattice cage shape solver

requirements.acceptance_criteria: non_rigid_wrap_solver is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, wrap fit report, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence non_rigid_wrap_solver. It must support fit production mesh to DAZ/reference surface using Faceform/R3DS Wrap or Blender fallback while preserving topology, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: fit production mesh to DAZ/reference surface using Faceform/R3DS Wrap or Blender fallback while preserving topology. Required output: wrap fit report.
requirements.title: Run non-rigid wrap solver

requirements.acceptance_criteria: regional_refinement_solver is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, regional refinement report, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence regional_refinement_solver. It must support refine face, hands, feet, torso, abdomen, chest, hips, thighs, arms, calves, and neck separately, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: refine face, hands, feet, torso, abdomen, chest, hips, thighs, arms, calves, and neck separately. Required output: regional refinement report.
requirements.title: Run regional refinement solver

requirements.acceptance_criteria: fit_shape_key_baker is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, shape key bake manifest, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence fit_shape_key_baker. It must support store fitted character shape as versioned production shape key/delta while preserving topology and maps, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: store fitted character shape as versioned production shape key/delta while preserving topology and maps. Required output: shape key bake manifest.
requirements.title: Bake fit as production shape key

requirements.acceptance_criteria: texture_projection_to_production_uvs is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, texture projection report, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence texture_projection_to_production_uvs. It must support project DAZ/reference skin/material/skinmark information to production UVs without inheriting DAZ topology, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: project DAZ/reference skin/material/skinmark information to production UVs without inheriting DAZ topology. Required output: texture projection report.
requirements.title: Project textures to production UVs

requirements.acceptance_criteria: high_poly_detail_bake is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, detail bake manifest, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence high_poly_detail_bake. It must support normal, displacement, vector displacement, pores, wrinkles, folds, skin marks, muscle cuts, and cellulite-like detail to production maps, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: normal, displacement, vector displacement, pores, wrinkles, folds, skin marks, muscle cuts, and cellulite-like detail to production maps. Required output: detail bake manifest.
requirements.title: Bake high poly detail

requirements.acceptance_criteria: fit_distance_heatmap is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, fit heatmap evidence, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence fit_distance_heatmap. It must support nearest-surface distance, silhouette error, volume error, and protected-region error across reference views, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: nearest-surface distance, silhouette error, volume error, and protected-region error across reference views. Required output: fit heatmap evidence.

requirements.acceptance_criteria: topology_uv_invariant_proof is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, invariant proof JSON, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence topology_uv_invariant_proof. It must support vertex count, vertex order, face order, UV layout, named groups, mask IDs, physics IDs, and anchors unchanged, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: vertex count, vertex order, face order, UV layout, named groups, mask IDs, physics IDs, and anchors unchanged. Required output: invariant proof JSON.
requirements.title: Prove topology UV invariance

requirements.acceptance_criteria: fit_visual_overlay_certification is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, fit overlay QA report, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence fit_visual_overlay_certification. requirements.title: Certify fit visual overlays
